title: Arrows, darts and bolts!
description: A mod for archers and rogues to shoot away!
body:
Adds a compound bow and some new enchantments to play around with!


* enchantments

Marksman: Deals double damage on headshot.

Pullback: Longer charge time for higher damage. 
(exclusive with the power enchantment)

Accelerate: Speeds up your shot to hitscan.


* recipes

Thread: 1 string, 1 leather and 1 iron nugget.

Compound bow: 1 netherite scrap, 1 copper ingot, 3 iron ingots and 3 threads.
